name: Form Card
description: 表单卡片，适合联系表单、注册、预约等场景，支持深浅色、RTL、响应式

template.html:
{{name}}

{{description}}
template.css: .form-card{background:var(--card-bg,#fff);border:1px solid var(--card-border,#e5e7eb);border-radius:var(--card-radius,20px);padding:var(--card-padding,28px);box-shadow:var(--card-shadow,0 16px 40px rgba(15,23,42,.08));max-width:720px;margin:0 auto}.form-card-title{font-size:var(--title-font-size,22px);font-weight:var(--title-font-weight,700);color:var(--title-color,#0f172a);margin:0 0 8px}.form-card-desc{font-size:var(--description-font-size,14px);color:var(--description-color,#64748b);line-height:1.7;margin:0 0 20px}.demo-form{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px}.demo-form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:14px}.demo-form label{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#334155}.demo-form input,.demo-form textarea{width:100%;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #d1d5db;background:#fff;color:#111827;font:inherit}.demo-form button{padding:14px 18px;border:none;border-radius:12px;background:#7c3aed;color:#fff;font-size:var(--button-font-size,15px);font-weight:700;cursor:pointer}.dark .form-card,[data-theme="dark"] .form-card{background:#111827;border-color:#1f2937}.dark .form-card-title,[data-theme="dark"] .form-card-title{color:#f9fafb}.dark .form-card-desc,[data-theme="dark"] .form-card-desc{color:#94a3b8}.dark .demo-form label,[data-theme="dark"] .demo-form label{color:#cbd5e1}.dark .demo-form input,.dark .demo-form textarea,[data-theme="dark"] .demo-form input,[data-theme="dark"] .demo-form textarea{background:#0f172a;border-color:#374151;color:#f9fafb}[dir="rtl"] .form-card{text-align:right}@media(max-width:640px){.demo-form-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

description.default: Use this card to collect contact information, project briefs, or customer requests.
